message:
test(bd-z39c): add 45 unit tests for docket.rs distributed task queue

Cover DocketSettings construction/clone/debug/fluent setters, backend type
debug, RedisSettings clone, DocketTask new/debug/clone/serde roundtrip,
to_task_info for pending/completed, to_task_result for non-terminal/completed/
failed, SubmitOptions default/debug, DocketError display variants/std Error/
Into<McpError>/debug, QueueStats default/debug/clone, MemoryDocketBackend
dequeue empty/wrong type/sets running, ack/nack/get nonexistent, cancel
terminal/removes from pending, list with limit/filter, stats all statuses,
requeue stale no-op, ack marks completed, priority ordering, Docket debug/
settings/into_shared/get nonexistent/cancel nonexistent/sequential IDs/
max_retries override/redis-without-feature, Worker is_running/stop/debug/
handler error nacks with retry. Server crate: 803 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
